headline: Nasdaq: My Multiple Target Has Been Reached, So I Am Upgrading To A Buy
summary: Nasdaq increased net revenues by 14% and raised its dividend by 15%, reinforcing its dividend growth track record. Read why NDAQ stock is a Buy.
